title: Straame Seagrass Storage Baskets Set of 4 - Handwoven Wicker Organisers with Handles, Steel-Reinforced Frame, Nesting Design - 30 x 22 x 15 cm, Natural seagrass material for Shelves, Bathroom and Home
features: Tidy Shelves, Fast - Declutter bathrooms, bedrooms and living rooms with a coordinated set of 4 seagrass storage baskets. Each rectangular organiser is identical and sized for shelves and units (30 x 22 x 15 cm), so your storage baskets for shelves line up neatly. Handwoven wicker texture in natural tones blends with modern, rustic or bohemian decor; basket organiser for cube storage and alcoves.

Sturdy Daily Use - A hidden steel wire frame supports the 100% natural seagrass weave, helping each basket keep its shape under everyday loads. Lightweight yet durable, these wicker baskets handle toiletries, cleaning products, snacks and stationery with ease. Ideal as woven storage baskets for hallways, bedrooms and home offices.

Space-Saving Stack & Nest – When not in use, all four baskets nest inside one another to save cupboard space. Stackable rectangular profile lets you arrange vertically on sturdy shelves where suitable. The slim 30 × 22 cm footprint and 15 cm height fit narrow shelves and under sinks. Set weight: 1.75-2.00 kg. Great as small baskets for storage purposes at home.

Easy to Lift and Move – Integrated seagrass insert handles make it easy to pull each storage basket from a shelf or carry it between rooms. The steel-reinforced frame helps the edges keep their shape in daily use. Use as bathroom baskets for towels, toilet rolls and lotions, or as kitchen storage baskets for dry goods, snacks and cleaning products; also suits in living rooms as shelf baskets for remotes, small electronics and magazines.

Handwoven from 100% Natural seagrass, these woven baskets add warm, organic texture with a classic basket wicker look that elevates bathrooms, bedrooms and kitchens without visual clutter. The neutral honey-brown colour suits modern minimalist, Scandinavian, coastal and cosy cottage décor, blending easily with existing baskets and bins. The woven surface is simple to care for: wipe with a dry or barely damp cloth and air dry. Suited to light to medium loads, they keep everyday items organised while maintaining a natural, design-led finish.
